creator: blake1024@gmail.com
text:
I cannot exit X.  I installed xorg.  I can get in okay but I can't exit.  I tried Ctl-Alt-Backspace, Ctl-Alt-F1, exiting the window manager.

When I use Ctl-Alt-Backspace the screen blanks and goes into power save mode.  Nothing I can do gets the screen back.  I tried Ctl-Alt-F1-8

Ctl-Alt-Del reboots the machine.

I have tried this with twm, Gnome and xfce.

Thanks.
